name: Spicy Grilled Steak (Shawayuh)
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Beef boneless sirloin steak (1 1/2-inches thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slash the outer edge of the fat on the beef steak diagonally at 1-inch intervals to prevent curling (do not cut into the lean meat).
2. Mix together the remaining ingredients.
3. Sprinkle the mixture on both sides of the beef and lightly press it into the meat.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
5. Grill the beef over medium hot coals, turning 2 or 3 times, until it reaches the desired doneness (25 to 35 minutes for medium).
6. Cut into serving pieces.
